title: Sepd_Kits
description: A Better Kits Plugin For Your Server
body:
🛡️ Sepd_Kits – The Ultimate Kit Plugin for Your Server!

Sepd_Kits is a lightweight yet powerful plugin that lets you create, manage, and claim custom kits with ease. Perfect for PvP, survival, or any server that needs a smooth kit experience.

✨ Features:

Create unlimited kits with custom cooldowns

Easy-to-use commands and clean formatting

Permission-based access to specific kits

Fully customizable messages and config

Perfect for donor perks, PvP loadouts, starter kits & more

🗡️ Commands:

/createkit <name> – Create a new kit from your inventory

/editkit <name> – Update a kit's contents

/deletekit <name> – Permanently remove a kit

/renamekit <old> <new> – Rename a kit

/givekit <player> <kit> – Give a kit to a player

/claimkit <kit> – Claim a kit via command

/reloadkits – Reload all kits and configuration

/kit – Open the interactive GUI

/helpkit – View all plugin commands


Support - [Here](https://discord.com/invite/9njKeJzWF4)
Visit - [Web](https://home.sepdyhub.online/mc-plugin/main.html)


📦 Plug-and-play simplicity, made for servers that want performance and flexibility.
